description:

	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _burn(address(this),amount) (contracts/ERC20WithPartialRefund.sol#66)

		- _balances[to] += value (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20.sol#205)
	- _burn(address(this),amount) (contracts/ERC20WithPartialRefund.sol#66)
		- _totalSupply += value (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20.sol#185)
		- _totalSupply -= value (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20.sol#200)
